question: Which Colorectal trials had at least 4 arms and used Chemo/Anti-EGFR+Radiotherapy as control?
gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Number of arms" >= 3 AND "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';

SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Class of ICI" = 'PD-L1' AND "Cancer type" = 'Breast' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Durvalumab, Tremelimumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2';

question: Show Renal cell trials with at least 2 prior lines of therapy that used combination treatment. (return fewer columns)?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Lines of treatment", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Lines of treatment" >= 2 AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

question: Show Renal cell trials with at least 2 prior lines of therapy that used combination treatment. (using only one filter condition)?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Lines of treatment", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell';

question: Show Renal cell trials with at least 2 prior lines of therapy that used combination treatment. (with a relaxed numeric threshold on Lines of treatment)?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Lines of treatment", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Lines of treatment" >= 1 AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';
variation_note: with a relaxed numeric threshold on Lines of treatment

question: List Bladder trials requiring a biomarker other than PD‑L1 for inclusion. (using only one filter condition)?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Cancer type", "Primary endpoint" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion" = 'No';

mutation.kept_condition: "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion" = 'No'
